info.title: RMS Backend
info.description: Enterprise-grade Reimbursement Management System API. Provides comprehensive reimbursement lifecycle management including submission, workflow-driven approval, payment processing, and reporting.

schema.title: Response List Departments Api Departments  Get
Response List Designations Api Designations  Get
Response List Locations Api Locations  Get
Response List Companies Api Companies  Get
Response List Cost Centers Api Cost Centers  Get
Response List Employees Api Employees  Get
Response List Projects Api Projects  Get
Response List Expense Types Api Expense Types  Get
Response Get Reimbursement Types Api Workflow Reimbursement Types Get
Response Get Workflow Definitions Api Workflow Definitions Get
Response Get Workflow Steps Api Workflow Definitions  Workflow Id  Steps Get

post.description: Authenticate with email and password to receive JWT access and refresh tokens.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access/refresh token pair (token rotation).
Request a password reset token for the given email address. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.
Reset password using a valid password reset token. The token is one-time use.
Blacklist the current access token and optionally the refresh token to end the session.

get.description: Verify the current access token and return its claims and validity status.
Get the authenticated user's profile including roles and permissions.

schema.title: Response Get Current User Profile Api Auth Me Get

post.description: Change the authenticated user's password. All other sessions are revoked after password change.

get.description: List all active sessions for the authenticated user.

delete.description: Revoke all sessions for the authenticated user (logout everywhere).

schema.title: Response Revoke All Sessions Api Auth Sessions Delete

delete.description: Revoke a specific session by session ID. Useful for logging out other devices.

schema.title: Response Revoke Session Api Auth Sessions  Session Id  Delete

post.description: Unlock a locked user account. Requires admin role.

schema.title: Response Unlock Account Api Auth Admin Unlock  User Id  Post

get.description: Get authentication audit events for a specific user. Requires admin role.

schema.title: Response Get User Auth Events Api Auth Admin Events  User Id  Get

get.description: Get authentication audit events for the authenticated user.

schema.title: Response Get My Auth Events Api Auth Events Get
Response List Permissions Api Permissions Get

get.description: Returns OK if the application process is alive and responsive.
Returns OK if the application is ready to accept traffic.
Returns comprehensive health status of all system components.

schema.title: Response Get Reimbursement Applications Api Reimbursements Get
Response Get Pending Approvals Api Reimbursements Pending Approvals Get
Response Get Payment Methods Api Payment Methods Get
